docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $631.04 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT P AND J UTILITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
